query: Run a ralph loop over the checkout-foundation epic until every task is implemented, reviewed, and merged.
Set up an autonomous delivery loop for CHK01 — implement, review, fix, validate, MR — and let it run overnight.
Start an iterative loop: keep going until all tests pass, output COMPLETE when done.
Cancel the ralph loop, it's stuck.
How far along is the ralph loop?
Implement CHK01-01 against the approved design.
Review this branch against the acceptance criteria.
Is epic CHK01 done? Validate against tasks.md.
